records.ety: [L. Calx, calcis. limestone; cf. Gr. <?/ gravel. <?/, <?/, pebble, Skr. <?/ gravel, Ir. carraic rock Gael. carraig, W. careg, stone. Cf. Chalk.]

defs: The substance which remains when a metal or mineral has been subjected to calcination or combustion by heat, and which is, or may be, reduced to a fine powder.
notes: ☞ Metallic calxes are now called oxides.

defs: Broken and refuse glass, returned to the post.
